name: Pureed Black Bean Soup (Italian)
recipeInstructions:
DIRECTIONS: (Prep 10-15 mins; Soak 2 hrs; Cook 3 hrs):
1. Rinse beans and sort. Soak overnight. Drain. Rinse.
2. In an extra large saucepan, place the black beans, chicken stock, bay leaves, onions, garlic, and carrots. Simmer the ingredients for 2 to 3 hours, or until the beans are tender. Remove the bay leaves. Add more chicken stock or water if needed.
3. Strain the beans (reserve the liquid) and place them in a food processor. Blend the beans, adding enough of the reserved liquid so that a thick, pureed consistency is achieved.
4. Add the heavy cream, salt, and pepper. Stir them in so that they are well blended.
5. Garnish the soup servings with a dollop of sour cream. Sprinkle on the cilantro and diced tomatoes. Serves 8 to 10.
